flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Walla Walla University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.5k → $34.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Walla Walla University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.5k → $34.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Walla Walla University fell 50% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.2%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Walla Walla University rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 (18.4% → 20.3%).
